issue.title: [InstCombine] Commuted pattern is not handled
issue.body:
https://godbolt.org/z/aa5778bEf
```
define i8 @add-shl-sdiv-scalar0(i8 %x) {
  %sd = sdiv i8 %x, -4
  %sl = shl i8 %sd, 2
  %rz = add i8 %sl, %x
  ret i8 %rz
}

define i8 @add-shl-sdiv-scalar1(i8 %x) {
  %sd = sdiv i8 %x, -4
  %sl = shl i8 %sd, 2
  %rz = add i8 %x, %sl
  ret i8 %rz
}
```
Output:
```
define i8 @add-shl-sdiv-scalar0(i8 %x) {
  %rz = srem i8 %x, 4
  ret i8 %rz
}

define i8 @add-shl-sdiv-scalar1(i8 %x) {
  %sd = sdiv i8 %x, -4
  %sl = shl i8 %sd, 2
  %rz = add i8 %x, %sl
  ret i8 %rz
}
```
issue.author: dtcxzyw
